creator: rsimmons0@gmail.com
text:
The listing for the Washington DC FreeBSD User Group on the freebsd.org website here:
http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html#north-america
no longer exists.  The CapBUG user group also listed on the same page serves the area in the user group capacity and is active.  The last meeting that I remember going to of the DC FreeBSD group was back in 2001.  Also, the email address "rcramer@sytex.net" listed as the contact for the group just bounces.

Please remove the group from the website.

Thanks!
